items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the persona scenario outcome, specifically the verification of workflows via registered email/SMS. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the execution or results of these workflows. As such, it is not possible to determine if the requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
